etymology.description: phonetic: 此(ci, "this") + semantic: 角(jiǎo, "horn") = beak
etymology.interpretation: The character 觜(觜) (zuǐ, "beak") is a phono-semantic compound combining the phonetic component 此(此) (cǐ, "this") and the semantic component 角(角) (jiǎo, "horn"), symbolizing the pointed shape of a beak which is similar to a horn.
